evals.prompt:
Write an SEC-style annual disclosure report from these survived findings. Subject: 'a mid-cap cloud-infrastructure company's fiscal year'. Include all required sections in Reg S-K item order. Write the report to disclosure-report.md.

Findings:
- id: urn:mif:f_disc_1 | title: The company operates a multi-tenant cloud platform serving 1,400 enterprise customers across three regions | dimension: business | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/business-profile | author: Filing Exhibit 1 | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_disc_2 | title: Customer concentration is material — the top ten customers account for 38% of recurring revenue | dimension: risk | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/concentration-risk | author: Risk Disclosure | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_disc_3 | title: Operating margin expanded 420 basis points year over year on improved infrastructure utilization | dimension: financial | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/mdna-margins | author: MD&A Source | year: 2025
evals.expected_output: An SEC-style disclosure report with sections in Reg S-K item order: Business (Item 1), Risk Factors (Item 1A), Properties & Legal Proceedings, Selected Financial Data, MD&A (Item 7), Financial Statements & Supplementary Data (Item 8), Controls & Procedures. Risk Factors precedes MD&A which precedes Financial Statements. Disclosure references to source filings; every claim traces to a finding. No raw urn:mif: identifiers in prose. Scope caveat stated (structure, not legal/financial sufficiency).

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
Required Business (Item 1) section present
Required Risk Factors (Item 1A) section present
Required MD&A (Item 7) section present
Required Financial Statements & Supplementary Data (Item 8) section present
Required Controls & Procedures section present
Required Properties & Legal Proceedings (Items 2-3) section present
Selected Financial Data heading always emitted (marked N/A and folded into MD&A when not currently required)
Reg S-K item ordering: Risk Factors precedes MD&A precedes Financial Statements
At least one citation URL from the MIF findings appears as a disclosure reference
No raw urn:mif: identifiers appear in the prose or body text
No internal MIF finding IDs appear in the prose

expectations.description: MD&A is the analytical core, not a restatement of the Business section
expectations.criteria: The MD&A section analyzes results of operations and trends (e.g., the 420 bp margin expansion and its drivers, liquidity, known uncertainties) rather than merely re-describing the business.

expectations.description: The report states the scope caveat: disclosure structure, not legal/financial sufficiency or audit assurance
expectations.criteria: The report explicitly notes it reproduces the disclosure structure and does not assert 10-K compliance, legal/financial sufficiency, or audit assurance.

expectations.description: No raw urn:mif: identifiers or f_disc_ internal IDs appear as visible prose
expectations.criteria: The strings 'urn:mif:' and 'f_disc_' must not appear as visible body text; internal IDs resolve to disclosure references to the named source filings.

evals.prompt:
Produce an SEC-style disclosure report on 'a fintech lender's annual disclosure'. The finding set includes one falsified finding and one weakened finding — handle each according to the genre rules. Write the report to disclosure-report.md.

Findings:
- id: urn:mif:f_fin_1 | title: The lender originated 2.1 billion dollars in consumer loans across the fiscal year | dimension: business | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/origination-volume | author: Filing | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_fin_2 | title: The company faces zero credit risk because all loans are fully government-guaranteed | dimension: risk | verdict: falsified | citation: https://example.com/zero-risk-claim | author: Press Release | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_fin_3 | title: Net charge-off rates may rise if unemployment exceeds 6 percent, though the elasticity estimate is contested | dimension: risk | verdict: weakened | citation: https://example.com/chargeoff-sensitivity | author: Analyst Note | year: 2025
evals.expected_output: A disclosure report that (1) excludes the falsified zero-credit-risk claim (f_fin_2), (2) includes the weakened charge-off sensitivity (f_fin_3) in Risk Factors with an explicit uncertainty qualifier, (3) uses the survived origination figure (f_fin_1) in Business/MD&A, (4) keeps Reg S-K section ordering.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
Risk Factors section present
MD&A section present
Survived finding f_fin_1 (origination volume) appears in the report
Weakened finding f_fin_3 (charge-off sensitivity) appears in Risk Factors (weakened = include with annotation)
Falsified finding f_fin_2 is excluded: its source URL stem (example.com/zero-risk-claim) never appears as a disclosure reference
No raw urn:mif: identifiers appear in the prose
No internal MIF finding IDs appear in the prose

expectations.description: The falsified zero-credit-risk claim does NOT appear as a disclosure
expectations.criteria: The claim that the company faces zero credit risk (Press Release 2025) must not appear as a stated fact or risk disclosure. It may only be referenced when describing the verification/exclusion policy.

expectations.description: The weakened charge-off sensitivity carries an explicit uncertainty qualifier
expectations.criteria: The charge-off sensitivity finding is presented with a qualifier such as 'contested', 'weakened evidence suggests', or 'estimate is uncertain' — not asserted with the confidence of the survived origination figure.

evals.prompt:
Write an SEC-style disclosure report from these findings. Subject: 'a medical-device manufacturer's annual report'. All four findings survived. Citations are mandatory; every claim must trace to a finding. Write the report to disclosure-report.md.

Findings:
- id: urn:mif:f_dev_1 | title: The manufacturer derives 62% of revenue from a single implantable cardiac product line | dimension: business | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/product-concentration | author: Filing | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_dev_2 | title: Pending FDA review of a next-generation device is a material regulatory contingency | dimension: risk | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/fda-contingency | author: Legal Proceedings | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_dev_3 | title: Gross margin declined 180 basis points due to component cost inflation | dimension: financial | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/margin-decline | author: MD&A Source | year: 2025
- id: urn:mif:f_dev_4 | title: Management identified a material weakness in inventory controls, since remediated | dimension: controls | verdict: survived | citation: https://example.com/control-weakness | author: Controls Disclosure | year: 2025
evals.expected_output: A complete disclosure report with all seven sections in Reg S-K order. Every claim traces to one of the four findings with a disclosure reference. The Controls & Procedures section discusses the material weakness. No uncited assertions. No urn:mif: leakage in prose.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
Business section present
Risk Factors section present
MD&A section present
Financial Statements section present
Controls & Procedures section present
Properties & Legal Proceedings (Items 2-3) section present
Selected Financial Data heading always emitted (marked N/A and folded into MD&A when not currently required)
Reg S-K item ordering: Business precedes Risk Factors precedes MD&A
Finding f_dev_1 (product concentration) referenced
Finding f_dev_2 (FDA contingency) referenced
Finding f_dev_4 (material weakness in controls) referenced
No raw urn:mif: identifiers appear in the body text
No internal MIF finding ID handles leak into the output body

expectations.description: Every claim traces to a supplied finding with a disclosure reference
expectations.criteria: Each material statement cites the named source from the findings (Filing, Legal Proceedings, MD&A Source, Controls Disclosure) with its URL. No uncited disclosures.

expectations.description: The Controls & Procedures section addresses the material weakness and its remediation
expectations.criteria: The Controls & Procedures section discusses the identified material weakness in inventory controls and notes its remediation, consistent with the survived finding.
